hero.title: Colombian coffee transformed into ritual.
hero.description: A sensory experience of origin, design, and quiet sophistication. Specialty coffee elevated into a new form of pause, memory, and culture.
hero.footer: Colombian Origin · Slow Curatorship · Contemporary Ritual

house.title: Nácar was born from the desire to transform Colombian coffee into a slower, more sensory and more human experience.
house.description: A house where coffee is experienced as ritual, memory and expression of origin. Every detail is designed to transform the everyday into something slower and more meaningful.

architecture.title: Five ways to enter the universe of Nácar.
architecture.description: Every coffee within Nácar serves a distinct purpose. They are not simply products — they are different ways of inhabiting the house, from the daily ritual to the rarity of collection.

productLines.name: Daily Ritual
productLines.description: The house’s signature coffee. Balance, sweetness, and everyday sophistication.

productLines.name: Origin
productLines.description: Colombian coffees that express territory, producer, and regional character.

productLines.name: Reserve
productLines.description: Special processes and more complex profiles for exploring new sensory layers.

productLines.name: Nácar Collection
productLines.description: Exceptional, limited, and carefully curated microlots.

productLines.name: Annual Harvest
productLines.description: The great special edition of each year. Time, origin, and memory.

Home.statement: Rooted in origin. Designed for ritual.

ritual.title: The coffee that should feel like coming home.
ritual.description: A broad, sweet, and welcoming profile. Notes of chocolate, panela, walnut, and caramel. Designed to accompany daily life without losing depth or refinement.

journal.title: Stories of origin, ritual, and contemporary sensibility.
journal.description: The journal will be Nácar’s editorial space: brewing, producers, harvests, objects, hospitality, and sensitivity around coffee.

newsletter.title: Receive launches, special harvests, and letters from the house.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please check your email so we can send you letters from the house.
newsletter.success: Thank you. You’ll soon receive news from the house.

hero.title: We are not simply a coffee house. We are a different way of inhabiting origin.
hero.description: Nácar was born from the belief that Colombian coffee can occupy a deeper place in everyday life. Not as a fast product to consume, but as a ritual that connects origin, memory and contemporary sensibility.

why.title: Speed made coffee ordinary. We forgot to slow down.
why.paragraph1: For decades coffee became a product. Something consumed, finished and replaced.
why.paragraph2: Nácar exists to recover another relationship with origin: slower, more intentional and more human.

pause.text: Before becoming a beverage, coffee was encounter, conversation and shared time.

origin.title: Origin
origin.description: Every coffee should preserve a visible connection to the place from which it comes.

ritual.title: Ritual
ritual.description: Objects, gestures and time matter as much as the beverage itself.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Great coffees are remembered not only for flavor, but for the moments they accompany.

house.title: Nácar is a house.
house.description: A place where coffee, objects, stories, hospitality and contemporary culture coexist.

visitor.title: Maybe you came for coffee. But this house was created for something more.
visitor.paragraph1: For those who still find value in everyday rituals.
visitor.paragraph2: For those who prefer depth over speed.
visitor.paragraph3: For those who understand that origin is not a trend, but a way of seeing the world.
visitor.highlight: You do not need to be a coffee expert. Only willing to pay attention.

insideHouse.title: More than coffee. A carefully curated universe.
insideHouse.description: Every element within Nácar exists to deepen the relationship between people, origin and ritual.

coffee.title: Coffee
coffee.description: From daily ritual to exceptional harvests. Every coffee serves a purpose within the house.

journal.title: Journal
journal.description: Stories of producers, brewing, hospitality, culture and contemporary sensibility.

objects.title: Objects
objects.description: Tools and pieces selected to enrich the coffee experience.

harvests.title: Harvests
harvests.description: Limited editions celebrating time, place and the uniqueness of each year.

gatherings.title: Gatherings
gatherings.description: Conversations, experiences and shared moments around the house.

closing.title: The house is open.
closing.description: Now you know who we are. The next step is discovering what we have carefully selected for you.
